title: oncocalyx rhamnifolius
intro: Oncocalyx rhamnifolius is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family, and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Oncocalyx rhamnifolius include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Oncocalyx rhamnifolius include its potential in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to boost the immune system. Oncocalyx rhamnifolius can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
